mapper.sql: id, customer_name, contact_person, contact_phone, province, city, address, service_level, status, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tbl_customer WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM tbl_customer WHERE deleted = 0
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%')
AND service_level = #{serviceLevel}
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_customer WHERE deleted = 0
AND customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND city LIKE CONCAT('%', #{city}, '%')
AND service_level = #{serviceLevel}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_customer (customer_name, contact_person, contact_phone, province, city, address, service_level, status, deleted, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{customerName}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{province}, #{city}, #{address}, #{serviceLevel}, #{status}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_customer SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
